description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with four stages in the order: test:shutdown-simulation, test, deploy:shutdown-simulation, and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs: source /home/cicd/CICD/bin/activate, ./tests/setup_simulation.py, export ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False, ansible-playbook -i gen/inventory_test_simulation ansible/site.yml, and a retry loop for ansible-playbook -i gen/inventory_test_simulation ansible/test.yml (for i in $(seq 1 8); do ...); configure it to run on all branches except master (except: master). Add a test:shutdown-simulation job in the test:shutdown-simulation stage that runs: source /home/cicd/CICD/bin/activate, ./tests/setup_simulation.py shutdown, sleep 60, and is triggered only for scheduled or manual web pipelines (only: schedules, web) while excluding master (except: master). Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs: netstat -rn, source /home/cicd/CICD/bin/activate, SIMULATION_NAME="prod_simulation" ./tests/setup_simulation.py, export ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False, ansible-playbook -i gen/inventory_prod_simulation ansible/site.yml, and the same retry loop for ansible-playbook -i gen/inventory_prod_simulation ansible/test.yml; this job runs only on the master branch (only: master). Finally, add a deploy:shutdown-simulation job in the deploy:shutdown-simulation stage that runs: source /home/cicd/CICD/bin/activate, SIMULATION_NAME="prod_simulation" ./tests/setup_simulation.py shutdown, sleep 60, and runs only for scheduled or web pipelines while excluding non‑master branches (except regex /^(?!master$)/, only: schedules, web).
